'''vathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:earthwardly|earthwardly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:earthwardly|earthwardly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vathate|vathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vathatesher|vathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vathatesherĂ«m|vathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vathatero|vathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vathateshĂ«|vathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vathateshĂ«m|vathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivathatero|gokivathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivathateshĂ«|gokivathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivathateshĂ«m|gokivathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govathankerom|govathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govathankeshĂ«|govathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govathankeshĂ«m|govathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govathankeya|govathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vathaterom|vathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vathatemu|vathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vathateya|vathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivathaterom|gokivathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivathatemu|gokivathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivathateya|gokivathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vathathate|vathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vathathatesher|vathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vathathatesherĂ«m|vathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vathathatero|vathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vathathateshĂ«|vathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vathathateshĂ«m|vathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivathathatero|gokivathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivathathateshĂ«|gokivathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivathathateshĂ«m|gokivathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govathathankerom|govathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govathathankeshĂ«|govathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govathathankeshĂ«m|govathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govathathankeya|govathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vathathaterom|vathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vathathatemu|vathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vathathateya|vathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivathathaterom|gokivathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivathathatemu|gokivathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivathathateya|gokivathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠthĂŠte|vĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠthĂŠtesher|vĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠthĂŠtero|vĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠthĂŠtero|gokivĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠthĂŠnkerom|govĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠthĂŠnkeya|govĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠthĂŠterom|vĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠthĂŠtemu|vĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠthĂŠteya|vĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠthĂŠterom|gokivĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠthĂŠteya|gokivĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafthafte|vafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafthaftesher|vafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafthaftesherĂ«m|vafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafthaftero|vafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafthafteshĂ«|vafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafthafteshĂ«m|vafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafthaftero|gokivafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafthafteshĂ«|gokivafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafthafteshĂ«m|gokivafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafthafnkerom|govafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafthafnkeshĂ«|govafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafthafnkeshĂ«m|govafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafthafnkeya|govafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafthafterom|vafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafthaftemu|vafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafthafteya|vafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafthafterom|gokivafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafthaftemu|gokivafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafthafteya|gokivafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
